PowerShell(foreach \($p in 5174,5175\) { try { $c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $p -State Listen -ErrorAction Stop; $c | Select-Object -Expand OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Output "stopped PID $_ on port $p" } } catch { Write-Output "nothing listening on $p" } })

PowerShell($p = Get-Process -Id 56068 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($p\) { Write-Output "PID 56068 alive: $\($p.ProcessName\), started $\($p.StartTime\)"; $p | Select-Object Path | Format-List } else { Write-Output "PID 56068 is gone" }; Write-Output "--- current owner of :8000 ---"; Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object LocalAddress, OwningProcess | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell(for \($i=0; $i -lt 15; $i++\) { if \(-not \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\)\) { Write-Output ":8000 free after $i s"; break }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1 }; if \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\) { Write-Output ":8000 still held \(stale socket\)" } else { Write-Output ":8000 confirmed free" })

PowerShell(Get-CimInstance Win32_Process | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -match 'uvicorn|pattern_mirror' } | Select-Object ProcessId, Name, @{n='Cmd';e={$_.CommandLine.Substring\(0,[Math]::Min\(90,$_.CommandLine.Length\)\)}} | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell(Get-CimInstance Win32_Process | Where-Object { $_.Name -match 'python|uv\\.exe' } | Select-Object ProcessId, ParentProcessId, Name, @{n='Cmd';e={\($_.CommandLine -replace '\\s+',' '\).Substring\(0,[Math]::Min\(120,\($_.CommandLine -replace '\\s+',' '\).Length\)\)}} | Format-Table -Wrap -AutoSize)

PowerShell($c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { $c | Select-Object -Expand OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Output "stopped $_" } }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; if \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\) { Write-Output ":8000 still held" } else { Write-Output ":8000 free" })
